sampleResults.title: Michigan AD says Dusty May has agreed on deal to stay Wolverines coach 'for many years to come'
sampleResults.description: ANN ARBOR, Mich. (AP) — Michigan coach Dusty May has agreed on a deal that will have him continuing to lead the Wolverines “for many years to come,” athletic director Warde Manuel said Saturday.
